title: WizardEx
body:
This mod aims to improve the Wizarding experience in Minecraft by integrating it with other fine mods such as itself.

Currently the mod is only supporting integration with PlayerEx by adding a new "Magic" page to the E menu that allows the player to allocate thier skill points gained by leveling up in PlayerEx on the available schools of magic.

 
The currently available schools are:
    - Fire
    - Frost
    - Arcane
    - Healing (via Paladins and Priests)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWOFI2Xj/images/ef910b4a844329b21edc52baf0c41c84e642a2f4.png)
